# GitHub Review Notes

This folder is not the primary home for workspace review reports.

For this repository, durable review reports belong under `docs/reviews/`, where they can follow the
current week-based four-layer model:

1. `src/weekN/01-notes/`
2. `src/weekN/02-quizzes/`
3. `src/weekN/03-notebooks/`
4. `src/weekN/04-discussions/`

Use this folder only for GitHub-specific review metadata if it becomes necessary later. Do not recreate
old category-based or three-layer review indexes here.
